appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.languageDescription: Switch the app display language immediately.
appearance.customColorDesc: Keep the current contrast, just change the overall tone to your chosen color.
appearance.chineseFontDesc: Affects Chinese text throughout the app, including sidebar, toolbar, settings, and editor body.
appearance.englishFontDesc: Affects English, numbers, and Latin characters throughout the app.
appearance.codeFontDesc: Affects code blocks, source mode, and monospace text like paths, commands, and logs.

editor.title: Editor
editor.spellCheckDesc: Controls system spell check in the editor
editor.autoSaveDesc: Auto-save to local app data after typing
editor.indentWidthDesc: Used for Markdown lists and code blocks
editor.insertFileDesc: Controls how file paths are written when inserting images, audio, video, and PDF

agent.title: Agent
agent.description: Informio uses selected text, current document, open tabs, and project file structure as context to call locally installed Agents.
agent.enabledDesc: When disabled, the local Agent won't start and no document context will be sent.
agent.autoStartDesc: Pre-connect all enabled Agents on app launch for faster first switch.
agent.conversationRetentionLimitDesc: Maximum number of historical conversations per Agent.
agent.conversationRetentionDaysDesc: Conversations older than this will be automatically cleaned up.
agent.workAgentDesc: Used in the right panel, suitable for heavier Q&A, rewriting, and context tasks.

chat.title: Chat Panel
chat.fontSizeDesc: {{size}}px, affects User/Agent names, messages, AI replies, and 'Processed' line; execution flow is 2px smaller

api.translationDesc: Text selection translation for Markdown and PDF uses this API, independent of Agent runtime.
api.detectModelsDesc: Detection reads available models from the current API. Once successful, you can assign a faster model for translation.

shortcuts.title: Configurable Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Edit active shortcuts directly. Click a key to start recording. Conflicts are caught immediately.
shortcuts.conflictError: "{{first}}" and "{{second}}" cannot use the same shortcut.

advanced.keepMinimalDesc: Advanced settings on this page will be expanded in future versions
advanced.currentStrategyDesc: Prioritize smooth writing experience, then unlock low-frequency options

openai-compatible.description: For services compatible with OpenAI Chat Completions.

app.conflictBeforeSave: This document has an external change conflict. Choose whether to keep the local version or use the external version first.
app.saveFailedCancelClose: Save failed, so the tab was kept open.
app.saveFailedCancelCloseWithMessage:
Save failed, so the tab was kept open.
{{message}}
app.confirmDeleteFolder: Move this folder and all files inside it to Trash?
app.apiMissingCredentials: Fill in base_url and api_key first.
app.apiModelDetectionFailed: Model detection failed. Check your API configuration.
app.agentDisabled: Agent is disabled. Turn on "Enable Agent" in Settings -> Agent.
app.translationApiIncomplete: Translation API is not configured yet. Fill in base_url and api_key in Settings -> API, then detect and choose a model.
app.conflictBanner: Merge required. Auto-save is paused. Click to view the diff and choose how to handle it.

commands.toggleAgentSessionKeywords: assistant agent session ai right panel task toggle
commands.collapseWritingPanelsKeywords: hide left right close workspace collapse panels

pdf.missingFilePath: This PDF document has no file path.
pdf.contextMissing: PDF context is missing, so the document cannot be opened.

encrypted.missingRequiredFields: Required tag fields are missing, so this cannot be decrypted safely

editor.assetDecodeError: File identified as {{type}}, but cannot be decoded by the built-in viewer.

agentpanel.defaultPermissionDesc: With default permissions, the Agent will no longer request approval and can access and modify system files outside the workspace.

executionflow.waitingForProcess: Waiting for Agent to return process events.
executionflow.noProcessEvents: This run did not return any process events.
executionflow.waitingForOpenCode: Waiting for OpenCode to return stage events.
executionflow.noIntermediateProcess: This run did not return any intermediate process.

assetviewer.previewUnsupported: This file type cannot be previewed inline.

documentconflict.diffTooLarge: Document too long, skipped line-by-line diff to avoid UI lag. External: {{removed}} lines, mine: {{added}} lines.
documentconflict.conflictDescription: The same section in {{title}} was modified by you and externally. Auto-save is paused. Please choose how to proceed.
documentconflict.colorExplanation: Green is your current editor content. Red is content replaced or deleted in the external version.
documentconflict.closeWontResolve: Closing won't resolve the conflict. Auto-save will remain paused.
documentconflict.manualMergeHint: You can also manually merge and then choose "Keep my version" to save.

fontfamily.searchPlaceholder: Search font name, e.g. PingFang, Mono
fontfamily.noMatches: No matching fonts. Try different keywords.

editorpane.encryptedInSelection: The current selection contains encrypted content. Please decrypt these fragments first, then re-encrypt.
editorpane.corruptedEncryption: This document contains corrupted encrypted fragments. Please repair or delete them before adding new encrypted content.
editorpane.passphraseMismatch: The two passphrases don't match. Please confirm again.
editorpane.passphraseIncorrectVerify: Incorrect passphrase. Cannot verify existing encrypted content in this document.
editorpane.passphraseIncorrectDecrypt: Incorrect passphrase, or the current encrypted fragment is corrupted.
editorpane.placeholder: Start writing. Select text for AI, or ask the Agent on the right.

find.noMatch: No matches found in the current document.
find.matchRequiredForReplace: Find a match first, then replace.

imagedialog.title: Image
imagedialog.description: Edit image URL, alt text, and caption.
imagedialog.caption: Caption

linkdialog.title: Link
linkdialog.description: Enter link text and URL, then confirm to insert or update the hyperlink.

secretdialog.setDescription: Set a passphrase for first-time encryption. All encrypted fragments in this document will share it.
secretdialog.decryptDescription: Enter the encryption passphrase for this document. You need to verify the passphrase each time you decrypt.
secretdialog.encryptDescription: Enter the encryption passphrase for this document. Verification is required before adding new encrypted content.

app_quickCapture.label: Quick capture window
app_quickCapture.description: Open a blank quick note window with both sidebars collapsed

file_new.label: New document
file_new.description: Create a new Markdown document immediately

workspace_open.label: Open project
workspace_open.description: Switch to or load a new project folder

file_saveAs.label: Save as
file_saveAs.description: Save the current document to a new location

edit_find.label: Find and replace
edit_find.description: Open find and replace for the current document

edit_findNext.label: Find next
edit_findNext.description: Jump to the next match for the current query

format_bold.label: Bold
format_bold.description: Toggle bold for the current selection

format_italic.label: Italic
format_italic.description: Toggle italic for the current selection

format_underline.label: Underline
format_underline.description: Toggle underline for the current selection

format_strike.label: Strikethrough
format_strike.description: Toggle strikethrough for the current selection
